channel.title: smallorbit blog
channel.description: Plan, execute, and ship — Claude Code plugin essays and kit deep-dives from smallorbit.

item.title: flowkit: runtime staging detection, two preview-epic models, and CalVer with a .N hotfix suffix
item.description: Three small opinions doing most of the load-bearing work in the kit that ships your code.

item.title: From Idea to Release with smallorbit-plugins
item.description: A tour of the kits and how they compose

item.title: polishkit: weighted taste, two-phase sweep, and a soft cap on cross-cutting cleanups
item.description: What the appraise rubric's weights actually say about taste, and why /sweep and /polish stop where they do.

item.title: sessionkit: continuity that survives a context reset
item.description: How HANDOFF.md round-trips your task list, why /skillit refuses duplicates, and what /retro routes where.

item.title: Speckit: from one-liner to dispatchable epic
item.description: How the simple-vs-full classifier, four silent merge rules, and the epic:<slug> contract turn a vague idea into a labelled issue set the rest of the toolchain reads.

item.title: squadkit: roles, squads, and crews — multi-agent without the chaos
item.description: The vocabulary that makes teams legible, the orchestrator-is-lead pattern that avoids a redundant agent, and the detached-HEAD trick that keeps builders from stepping on each other.

item.title: swarmkit: stacked PRs, up-front retargeting, and a reviewer that knows when to stop
item.description: What it actually takes to run parallel agents on one repo without the merge step turning into a second job.

item.title: vaultkit: an Obsidian sidekick that respects your timeline
item.description: Why birth-time preservation matters, when /handoff and /archive-export trade off, and what makes /jot the lowest-friction capture path.

item.title: Welcome to the smallorbit blog
item.description: What we're building, why it matters, and how the kits fit together

item.title: Stacked PRs without the headache
item.description: How swarmkit dispatches isolated agents and merges their work top-down
